topic: AI + creator workflow grounded in professional production experience

candidates.proposedTitle: The Cut AI Can't Feel
candidates.idea: AI auto-cuts on technical rules; a pro editor holds for emotional landing. Side-by-side: AI cut vs editor's hold on the same footage.
candidates.thumbnailConcept: Split screen: AI cut timeline vs editor's timeline with red/green highlight
candidates.viewerPromise: You'll see exactly what AI editing tools miss — and why it matters
candidates.targetViewer: Creators curious about AI editing tools
candidates.why_this_matters_now: AI tools are flooding creator workflows; professional perspective separates signal from noise
candidates.why_this_stays_relevant: Based on durable craft skills, not tool-specific features
candidates.why_this_fits_vidtoolz: Draws on 20 years of professional editing experience at YLE
candidates.why_vidtoolz_can_make_it_better: No other creator channel combines professional editing background with real AI production pipeline
candidates.audience_demand_rationale: Creators are actively evaluating AI tools and need grounded professional perspective
candidates.suggested_production_approach: Screen capture + A-roll, Resolve timeline demonstration, max 3 min spoken word
